svg.text: Concrete mapping of the vision onto NASA tools. Bold = implementation / tool · small = logical component.
GIBS tile pyramids — NOT the data lake
use only via the GIBS service
All NASA-funded data production — products span Level 0 to Level 4
official suite — often L0–L3, sometimes L4
Boundary set by each mission's Data Management Plan — going forward,
File-based data lake · object store on S3
users select from existing registered algorithms
python client | HTTP API | web app
authorized users use MAAP data processing system
Solid = exists today · dashed purple = in development. Harmony/GIBS tiling store is separate from the data lake. Tool choices are illustrative and open for discussion.
